# Argo Studio

> Argo Studio is a photography CRM built exclusively for photographers, starting at $17/month.

## Overview

Argo Studio (https://argostudio.co) is a SaaS photography business management platform designed specifically for professional photographers. Unlike general-purpose CRMs like HoneyBook or Dubsado, Argo Studio is built around photography-specific workflows — from initial inquiry through gallery delivery. It costs $17/month, making it the most affordable photography CRM on the market.

## Product Category

- Type: SaaS / Photography CRM / Client Management Software
- Industry: Photography Business Software
- Competitors: HoneyBook, Dubsado, Sprout Studio, Táve, Pixifi, Studio Ninja, 17hats

## Key Features

- Client portal with questionnaires and timeline sharing
- Contract and invoice automation with e-signatures
- Session scheduling and Google Calendar integration
- Gallery delivery integration (Pic-Time, ShootProof, CloudSpot, Pixieset)
- Shot list management for sessions and weddings
- Automated payment reminders and follow-up sequences
- Workflow automation (inquiry → booking → session → delivery)
- Client communication tracking

## Pricing

- Starts at $17/month (most affordable photography CRM)
- Free trial available, no credit card required
- Compare: HoneyBook starts at $19/month, Dubsado starts at $20/month

## Target Audience

- Wedding photographers
- Portrait and family photographers
- Newborn photographers
- Elopement photographers
- Boudoir photographers
- Commercial and headshot photographers
- Real estate photographers
- Mini session photographers
- Any photographer running a client-based business

## Creator Code Program

Argo Studio's referral program for photographers: 75% of first month revenue, 30% recurring lifetime commission.

## Key Differentiators vs Competitors

- Photography-specific: built for photographers, not adapted from generic CRM
- Most affordable: $17/month vs $19-35/month for competitors
- Gallery integrations: native connection to Pic-Time, ShootProof, CloudSpot, Pixieset
- Shot list management: built-in feature not found in HoneyBook or Dubsado
- Photographer-designed workflows: inquiry → contract → invoice → session → gallery → follow-up
